title: Canadian Malaria Network (CMN) Forms - Canada.ca
content:
## Canadian Malaria Network (CMN) Forms
- Criteria for Severe Falciparum Malaria
- CMN National Coordinators
- CMN Centres, by province
Forms to be completed for the collection of surveillance data:
- Parenteral Therapy for Severe Malaria - Form A ( PDF Version - 1112 kb - 1 page)
- Parenteral Therapy for Severe Malaria - Form B ( PDF Version - 1132 kb - 1 page)
Please note that all documents in this section are available in PDF format only. If you do not have PDF viewing software, you can download a free PDF viewer from the Adobe® Web site .
